heading: Suspension and revocation of aircraft certificates
label: 44105 Suspension and revocation of aircraft certificates
text: The Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration may suspend or revoke a certificate of registration issued under when the aircraft no longer meets the requirements of .section 44103 of this titlesection 44102 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4410549 App.:1401(e)(1)., , ; , , .Aug. 23, 1958Oct. 19, 1984Pub. L. 85–726, § 501(e)(1)72 Stat. 772Pub. L. 97–449, § 7(b)96 Stat. 2444The words “when the aircraft no longer meets” are substituted for “for any cause which renders the aircraft ineligible” for consistency.
